'''majava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leaderess|leaderess]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-j-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leaderess|leaderess]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| majava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæjævæth|mæjævæth]] || [[word:mæjævæj|mæjævæj]] || [[word:mæjævæsh|mæjævæsh]] || [[word:mæjævæ|mæjævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:majajavath|majajavath]] || [[word:majajavaj|majajavaj]] || [[word:majajavash|majajavash]] || [[word:majajava|majajava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:majavath|majavath]] || [[word:majavaj|majavaj]] || [[word:majavash|majavash]] || [[word:majava|majava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:majafvath|majafvath]] || [[word:majafvaj|majafvaj]] || [[word:majafvash|majafvash]] || [[word:majafvaf|majafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:majavatha|majavatha]] || [[word:majavaja|majavaja]] || [[word:majavasha|majavasha]] || [[word:majavaka|majavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:majavath|majavath]] || [[word:majavaj|majavaj]] || [[word:majavash|majavash]] || [[word:majava|majava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:majavathal|majavathal]] || [[word:majavajal|majavajal]] || [[word:majavashal|majavashal]] || [[word:majavakal|majavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:majavathatha|majavathatha]] || [[word:majavajaja|majavajaja]] || [[word:majavashasha|majavashasha]] || [[word:majavaka|majavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:majavathan|majavathan]] || [[word:majavajan|majavajan]] || [[word:majavashan|majavashan]] || [[word:majavakan|majavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:majavathaoro|majavathaoro]] || [[word:majavajaoro|majavajaoro]] || [[word:majavashaoro|majavashaoro]] || [[word:majavakaoro|majavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
